mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, content, type, related_type, related_id, is_read, read_time, created_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
